standup_summary:
*☀️ Morning Standup*
Recipient: Cody
Date: June 7, 2026
Overall Status: 🟡 Attention Needed
Operations were mostly stable yesterday, but one reporting issue needs follow-up today. Primary focus is confirming shortage reporting is capturing every submitted employee.

*🔥 Priority Items*
• Investigate why shortage tracking only sent Destiny when multiple people were entered.
• Confirm the original submission data and workflow execution path match the posted Slack report.

*📈 Operational Highlights*
*Operations*
• Reviewed the app and operations issue tied to shortage reporting output.

*👤 Your Activity*
*You Completed*
• Reviewed the shortage reporting issue and narrowed the problem to message output versus submission intent.

*Awaiting Your Response*
• Decide whether to correct the reporting logic or rerun the affected submission after validation.

*Mentions*
• None.

*⚠️ Watch Items*
• Shortage reporting may be dropping employees when multiple names are submitted in one event.

*🎯 Today's Focus*
• Pull the original submission payload and compare it against the Slack message body.
• Review the relevant n8n execution logs before making any workflow change.
• Confirm whether this is a parsing issue or a downstream formatting issue.

*✅ Wins*
• The issue was isolated quickly enough to investigate before it repeated.

todoist_tasks.title: Investigate shortage tracking only sending Destiny
todoist_tasks.summary: Itzel entered multiple drawer shortages, but only Destiny appeared in the Slack report.
todoist_tasks.blocker: May need source submission data or n8n execution logs.
